jsonLd.title: Firstcry is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Firstcry. We are on the lookout for a dedicated E-commerce Executive to strengthen our Mysuru-based team.

About Firstcry:
Firstcry is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Learning & development budget
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Firstcry!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
